purpose: Current production bundle debt ceiling. The measured v3.51.20 exact csv_import and members_list UI boundary produces 4,554,710 raw / 1,304,738 gzip JavaScript bytes: +594 raw / +293 gzip versus the reviewed v3.51.19 artifact. The increase is limited to fail-closed import availability, entitlement-loss dialog reset and deterministic accessible focus restoration; no dependency was added. The total ceilings retain only the existing 128-byte raw and 279-byte gzip cross-platform/SHA allowances. Largest-file and CSS ceilings remain unchanged; the disabled-state class path was simplified so no new CSS debt is accepted. Further increases require an explicit reviewed baseline update.
